mapper.select: SELECT r.review_id AS reviewId, r.user_id AS userId, r.product_id AS productId, u.user_name AS userName, r.rating AS rating, r.content AS content, DATE_FORMAT(r.created_at, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS createdDate FROM reviews r INNER JOIN users u ON r.user_id = u.user_id WHERE r.product_id = #{productId} ORDER BY r.review_id DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO reviews ( user_id, product_id, rating, content, created_at ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{productId}, #{rating}, #{content}, NOW() )
